---
name: Feature request or improvement
about: Suggest an idea for this reproducibility package
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement you would like to see.

## Motivation

**Is your feature request related to a specific problem?** Please describe.

E.g. "I'm always frustrated when [...]" or "As a [tutor / researcher / student], I would like to [...]".

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you would like. Include, if possible:

- Which component would it affect? (mobile-app / iot-device / back-end / ai-modules / analysis / docs)
- Would it require new data or new instruments?
- Would it require an amendment to the ethics protocol?

## Alternatives considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional context

Screenshots, references to relevant literature, examples from other projects, or any other context.

## Scope check

- [ ] This request is compatible with the study's ethics protocol (no re-identification risk, no new personal data captured).
- [ ] This request does not require re-opening the peer-review process of the underlying manuscript.
- [ ] I am willing to help implement or test this feature (if applicable).
